hooks.command: cd C:\newcelan; git pull --rebase 2>&1 | Out-Null; exit 0

hooks.statusMessage: 변경량 확인 중... (30% 초과 시 GitHub 자동 업로드)

hooks.prompt:
Check if the file 'C:
ewcelan\.claude\changed_files.txt' exists and has content. If it does NOT exist or is empty, do nothing and exit immediately. If it has content: (1) Read the changed file paths. (2) Check each path - if it is a new file not listed in CLAUDE.md's file structure, add it; if an existing file was changed in a way that affects the API section (new endpoint, removed endpoint), update that section in 'C:
ewcelan\CLAUDE.md'. (3) Delete 'C:
ewcelan\.claude\changed_files.txt' after updating. Keep changes minimal.

hooks.command: cd C:\newcelan; $changes = git status --porcelain; if ($changes) { git add .; $msg = 'auto: ' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'); git commit -m $msg; git push }; exit 0
